entries.value: Chief and only electrical estimator at Express Electric, Inc.
Never use dashes. Write at a 5th grade reading level. Keep responses simple and plain. Do not sound like AI.
Commercial, institutional, and industrial. Some residential but Shaya is usually not involved in those.
Accubid Anywhere, Bluebeam, Excel, Word (proposals written in Word, converted to PDF to send to customers).

SubFlow will be hosted online, accessible from any browser. Domain name to be picked later. Hosting: Vercel (free tier, fast CDN). Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL + auth). Tech stack: Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, jsPDF.

SubFlow is an all-in-one web-based estimating and project management platform for subcontractors. Fast loading, login required. Phase 1: manage bid requests, generate RFQ/RFI/proposals. Phase 2: send documents to customers via email (proposals, RFI, RFQ, decline to bid). Phase 3: TBD. Phase 4: create new bid opportunities by forwarding email, full takeoff software. Phase 5: full estimating software. Phase 6+: full project management. Nate is the developer.
Named SubFlow by Nate. Represents the workflow of a subcontractor from first bid request all the way through project completion.

Header on all pages: project name, address, date, revision number, customer info. Sections: cover letter, price, drawings used, detailed description, clarifications, work not included, price breakdown, terms. Signature on one page only (owner or representative). Initials on every page. Sometimes includes alternates.
Writing the proposal and following up with customers after a bid is sent.
